metadata.name: London Open FVG Trend Continuation
metadata.author: Quant_Lab_Alpha
metadata.rationale: Tests the hypothesis that if the London session opens with price trapped inside a Higher Timeframe (4H) Imbalance, institutional volume will push price directionally to clear the gap.

filters.comment: Strictly trigger ONLY on the London Open candle

long_trigger.comment: Price opens the session inside a Bullish 4H FVG

short_trigger.comment: Price opens the session inside a Bearish 4H FVG
